parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, data: null, error: 'Unauthorized' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { short_id: $json.short_id, platform: $json.platform, message: 'Posting started' }, error: null }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ topic_id: $('Read Short').first().json[0].topic_id, short_id: $('Read Short').first().json[0].id, is_short: true, title: $('Validate Request').first().json.caption || $('Read Short').first().json[0].clip_title || 'Short', description: ($('Validate Request').first().json.hashtags || []).map(h => h.startsWith('#') ? h : '#' + h).join(' '), visibility: 'unlisted' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ topic_id: $('Read Short').first().json[0].topic_id, project_id: $('Read Short').first().json[0].project_id, stage: 'social_post', action: $json.success ? 'posted' : 'post_failed', status: $json.success ? 'success' : 'error', details: { platform: $json.platform, short_id: $json.short_id, post_id: $json.post_id, success: $json.success } }) }}
